tool_purpose: ControlNet is a neural network structure to control diffusion models by adding extra conditions. This checkpoint corresponds to the ControlNet conditioned on openpose images. Framework: Diffusers. Functionality: Text-to-Image Diffusion Models. API call: ControlNetModel.from_pretrained('lllyasviel/control_v11p_sd15_openpose').
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
